text.title: Architecture Repo Scaffolding Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure that walks an operator from trigger to validated artefact. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where applicable) a decision gate that stops the flow on policy violation.

step.name: confirm-cadence
step.action: Verify owner + frequency + evidence sources are named.

step.name: lay-down-dirs
step.action: Create canonical dirs + populate README routing table.

step.name: wire-fitness
step.action: Translate each target to executable script + CI hook.
step.decision-gate: Block if any target is still prose.
